nodes.context: A criminal gang in Croxteth, Liverpool, involved in the murder of Rhys Jones.
A rival gang to the Croxteth Crew, based in Norris Green, Liverpool.

edges.context: The Croxteth Crew and Norris Green Strand Crew were rival gangs; the murder of Rhys Jones occurred during a failed attempt by Croxteth Crew member Sean Mercer to shoot Strand Crew members.
